method: published whole-material Σ_R (ordinary concrete, OC-2), mass-normalized and re-derived at the repo's γ-attenuation density for γ↔n slab consistency
citation: Ahmed, R., Hassan, G.S., Scott, T. & Bakr, M. (2023), 'Assessment of Five Concrete Types as Candidate Shielding Materials for a Compact Radiation Source Based on the IECF', Materials 16(7) 2845, DOI 10.3390/ma16072845 (ordinary concrete OC-2: Σ_R = 0.09989 cm⁻¹ at ρ = 2.35 g/cm³).
